rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM DAWSON VS. PETER ISKANDAR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Notice Of Hearing Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings (Ccp Section 438)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 24, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT PETER ISKANDAR, LEE B. DO LLC.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings (Ccp Section 438) GRANTED with 30 day leave to amend as to existing causes of action only for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of each cause of action. Plaintiff's improper request for leave to amend to allege new causes of action is denied without prejudice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM DAWSON VS. PETER ISKANDAR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Attorney Fees After Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16 Special Motion To Strike (Anti-Slapp) Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 24, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT PETER ISKANDAR, LEE B. DO LLC. Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Attorney Fees After Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16 Special Motion To Strike (Anti-Slapp) Complaint GRANTED. Defendant is the prevailing party on the ANTI-SLAPP motion per Morrow v. Los Angeles Unified School District (2007) 149 Cal.App.4th 1424. Defendant's motion for fees is sufficiently supported by counsel declaration. Defendant shall recover $9,208.75. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES VS. JOSEPH WATKINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 24, 2017, line 9. DEFENDANT JOSEPH WATKINS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED. Motion to Quash is not the proper motion to address allegedly defective verification and verification is proper. Defendant shall file a response within 5 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)
